C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\func_templates.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\func_templates.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\func_templates.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\func_templates.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o func_templates.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libfunc_templates.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\func_templates.dir\linkLibs.rsp
